svg.title: Gym Management System Architecture — Super Admin, Gym Admin (web), Member (mobile)
svg.desc: Three-tier access architecture: Super Admin portal with cross-tenant visibility, Gym Admin portal (Next.js web), Member portal (React Native mobile), NestJS backend, Prisma ORM, and per-tenant PostgreSQL databases.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What features does the super admin portal have?')
sendPrompt('How does the super admin view all tenant databases?')
sendPrompt('What maintenance operations can the super admin perform?')
sendPrompt('What system-level controls does the super admin have?')
sendPrompt('What audit and billing reports are available to super admin?')
sendPrompt('How does the super admin provision or remove a gym tenant?')
sendPrompt('How does the super admin monitor system health?')
sendPrompt('What does the gym admin web portal manage?')
sendPrompt('What does the member mobile app allow members to do?')
sendPrompt('How does role-based routing work for super admin vs gym admin?')
sendPrompt('How does the tenant resolver identify which gym a request belongs to?')
sendPrompt('How does JWT auth guard work for different roles?')
sendPrompt('How does the super admin module bypass tenant isolation?')
sendPrompt('What does the auth module handle for each role?')
sendPrompt('What does the tenant module do?')
sendPrompt('What does the maintenance module handle?')
sendPrompt('What does the members module manage?')
sendPrompt('What does the classes module handle?')
sendPrompt('How is billing managed per tenant?')
sendPrompt('How does the reports module differ for super admin vs gym admin?')
sendPrompt('How does Prisma handle super admin cross-tenant queries?')
sendPrompt('How does the connection pool switch databases per tenant request?')

svg.text: Tenant databases — isolated PostgreSQL (one per gym)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tables exist in each tenant gym database?')
sendPrompt('How is a new gym database created when provisioned?')
sendPrompt('What is the database-per-tenant isolation strategy?')
sendPrompt('What does the central registry database store?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used across tenants?')
sendPrompt('What goes in object storage?')
sendPrompt('What external services does the system integrate with?')

svg.text: Super admin — full cross-tenant read/write + maintenance
Member — mobile app only (React Native, own tenant data)
NestJS modules — scoped per role via RBAC guards
Gateway & ORM — role routing + dynamic tenant DB connection
Super admin cross-tenant read path (bypasses tenant isolation)
